response.original_title: 朝起きたら隣に裸の同僚が。 なぜか敏感なカラダ。どうやら私は昨夜レズ堕ちしていたようです…【2段階レズ堕ち】 小野坂ゆいか 弥生みづき
response.overview: When she woke up… her colleague, Mizuki, was next to her in her underwear! "You were amazing last night," Mizuki smiles. Yuika, who can't remember anything, is stunned as Mizuki starts telling her about last night... The previous night, drunk and with no memory, she was enthusiastically led to lesbianism. The next morning, sober and with no memory, she is seduced again while trying to resist. A two-stage lesbian fall sex that is too stimulating for a straight woman! Her body, developed into a sensitive one, gradually begins to seek lesbian pleasure on its own.
response.title: Asa okitara Tonari ni Hadaka no Douryou ga. Nazeka Binkan'na Karada. Douyara Watashi wa Sakuya Rezu-ochi shiteita youdesu... [Nidan-kai Rezu-ochi]  Yuika Onosaka × Mizuki Yayoi
